sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113511" key="xezana/gkh" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χεζᾰνάγκη</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n113511.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">purgative plaster,</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg003:135" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3.135</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0715.tlg001:7:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Paul.Aeg.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">7.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
